description: In OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html), connect to the 'demodb' database (user: root, pass: GymAnything123!). The database contains 'Hotels' and 'Restaurants' vertex classes, which both have a 'City' property. Create a new edge class named 'IsNearby' that extends the base class 'E' and includes a String property named 'Type'. Establish 'IsNearby' edges from every Hotel to every Restaurant located in the same City, setting the 'Type' property of these edges to 'same_city'.
